---
title: "The History of the Life and Death of the Good Knight Sir Thomas Thumb, with divers other matters concerning the court of good King Arthur of Britain. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “"
---

## The History of the Life and Death of the Good Knight Sir Thomas Thumb, with divers other matters concerning the court of good King Arthur of Britain. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1855
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Thomas Constable and Co., Edinburgh: Hamilton, Adams, and Co, London:.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
